name: anna_story_post
caption:
I was the weakest climber in the group.

I climb up to 6c. Everyone else was climbing 7s. I was the only newbie, and everyone already knew each other.

I prefer vertical, technical routes. Rodellar is the opposite — everything overhanging and powerful. On my first day I was almost crying on a 6c+ with a cave and a roof at the top.

Jany made me take a few falls. After that I was calmer.

My goal for the camp was my first 7a. On my last day I tried a very powerful 7a with long moves. Four attempts. One move away from sending it.

During one of those attempts I was complaining — I can't do the moves, I'm too tired, I want to go down.

Jany said: if you can talk, you can climb.

I climbed two more quickdraws on the overhang. I couldn't believe it was me.

I thought I couldn't climb powerful routes. Turns out I was just doubting myself.

You never know your limits till you try.

— Anna, Rodellar, May 2026

#rodellar #rockbusters #climbingcamp #sportclimbing #firsttry #mindset #climbinglife #overhang #pushinglimits #rockclimbing
